title: anthyllis vulneraria var. arenaria
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. arenaria, also known as kidney vetch or sandy kidney vetch, is a variety of the anthyllis vulneraria plant, a flowering legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing. The health benefits of anthyllis vulneraria var. arenaria include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its ability to aid in the management of conditions like arthritis and eczema. In herbal preparations, anthyllis vulneraria var. arenaria is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat various health conditions.
